page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Phylogenetics - Bayesian estimation of phylogenies and multiple sequence alignments.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Markov chain monte carlo software for simultaneous bayesian estimation of alignment and phylogeny (and other parameters). it handles generic bayesian modeling via probabilistic programming.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Markov chain Monte Carlo software for simultaneous Bayesian estimation of alignment and phylogeny (and other parameters). It handles generic Bayesian modeling via probabilistic programming.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Markov chain Monte Carlo software for simultaneous Bayesian estimation of alignment and phylogeny (and other parameters). It handles generic Bayesian modeling via probabilistic programming.
